====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''====
[[File:Chloe family.png|thumb|250px|left|Chloe and her family]]
In ''[[JN002|Legend? Go! Friends? Go!]]'', a few years later, during the opening of the [[Cerise Laboratory]], Chloe found Ash passed out after Yamper knocked him down with an {{t|Electric}} attack. However, she discreetly left him lying on the stairs. She later formally introduced herself to Ash when she handed over schoolwork to Goh.

In ''[[JN011|Best Friend...Worst Nightmare!]]'', the students in Chloe's class participated in an exercise where they discussed their dreams for the future. Chloe became frustrated when her classmates immediately assumed she wanted to be a [[Pokémon Professor]] purely because her father is one. She received encouragement from [[Talia]], who told Chloe that she was still young and had plenty of time to decide what she wanted to do with her life. Later, Chloe returned to the laboratory only to find it under attack by a {{pkmn2|wild}} {{AP|Gengar}}. By commanding Yamper to battle for the first time, Chloe successfully drove Gengar out of the building.

In ''[[JN020|Dreams Are Made of These!]]'', Chloe accompanied Goh and some children during a [[Pokémon Orienteering]] competition. During the event, Goh and Chloe talked about the former's future and his goal to capture all of the Pokémon in the world.

[[File:Chloe and Pidove.png|thumb|250px|The Pidove Chloe took care of]]
In ''[[JN029|There's a New Kid in Town!]]'', Chloe's family found an injured {{p|Pidove}} and let it recuperate at their house. Due to its attachment towards Chloe, Yamper became jealous of Pidove whenever Chloe gave it attention. Despite this, when Pidove was threatened by a wild {{p|Fearow}}, Yamper put his jealousy aside and teamed up with Chloe to battle and defeat the Beak Pokémon, forcing it to flee. Afterwards, Chloe and her family said farewell to Pidove after its {{pkmn|Trainer}} came to the house to retrieve it.

In ''[[JN031|The Cuteness Quotient!]]'', after receiving a call from Parker to help his friend [[Jinny]], Chloe asked Ash and Goh to find out how Jinny could explore the beauty of her {{p|Feebas}}. To improve their skills, Jinny signed up for the [[Friendship Festival]]. While Ash and Goh trained the Pokémon, Chloe helped the girl on how to swim. Later, Chloe, Parker, Ash, and Goh traveled to [[Hoenn]] to watch Jinny participate in the competition.

In ''[[JN038|Restore and Renew!]]'', Chloe went with Ash and Goh to the [[Pewter Museum of Science]] to work on a research project for school. Despite her initial reluctance, Chloe became motivated to join the search for [[fossil]]s at the museum after a passionate lecture from the museum's [[curator]]. 

In ''[[JN047|Crowning the Chow Crusher!]]'', Chloe attends a [[Pokémon Grand Eating Contest]] with [[Chrysa]] and her father to watch Ash and Goh, who were participating. Although she was reluctant to come at first, Chloe ends up becoming perception and enthusiastic about the competition as it progresses. When Chloe watches [[Goh's Skwovet]] evolve into {{p|Greedent}}, she finally joins the crowd in celebrating Goh's victory.

In ''[[JN049|To Train, or Not to Train!]]'', Chloe was attending [[Vermilion City school|school]] alongside Goh when she noticed Yamper barking outside. Chloe went out to investigate to find Yamper was helping to hide an {{p|Eevee}} from two people. Thinking they were bad people, Chloe helped Yamper protect Eevee, only to encounter {{TRT}} who had captured the Pokémon belonging to her classmates. Chloe commanded Yamper to attack and with help from Eevee was able to defeat {{p|Pelipper}}. Later, Chloe learnt the people after Eevee were lab assistants at a Research Center regarding Eevee and her Evolutions. They were taking Eevee back with them when the Evolution Pokémon indicated that she wanted to stay with Chloe. Goh gave Chloe one of his Poké Balls which she used to catch Eevee. Later, her dad gave her a pink [[Rotom Phone]].

[[File:JN055.png|thumb|250px|left|Chloe riding Rapidash]]
In ''[[JN055|The Tale of You and Glimwood Tangle!]]'', Chloe travels to [[Galar]] to meet a {{rf|Galarian}} {{p|Ponyta}} and {{p|Rapidash}}, after reading a book about them, with Ash and Goh accompanying her. However, upon arriving at [[Glimwood Tangle]], Chloe gets separated from her friends, but encounters a Galarian Ponyta and follows the Unique Horn Pokémon. After catching up to Ponyta, Chloe sees that a Galarian Rapidash is injured and decided to tend to it. Chloe remembers that in the book she read before has information about a rainbow flower that might heal Rapidash, and goes to get its nectar with {{TP|Chloe|Eevee}} and Ponyta joining her. After getting the flower nectar, Chloe gives it to Rapidash, but it wasn’t enough to heal the Unique Horn Pokémon, until Eevee and Ponyta use {{m|Heal Pulse}} together to help it recover. Chloe and Eevee were given a ride to [[Ballonlea]] by the two Unique Horn Pokémon, then reunites with Ash and Goh.

In ''[[JN057|Memories of a Warming Kindness!]]'', Chloe stays at [[Chrysa]]'s place for a sleepover. While at Chrysa's place, Chloe finds a picture of her with a {{OBP|Trainer|JN057}} and a {{p|Psyduck}} with a scruff around its neck. After hearing how those two helped Chrysa become a researcher, Chloe believes that she has a crush on him, and goes to Ash and Goh for help in reuniting them, after finding out that they meet the Trainer and his Psyduck. However, Chloe becomes annoyed when she finds out that Chrysa only wanted to see the Trainer’s Psyduck again.

In ''[[JN063|On Land, In the Sea, and to the Future!]]'', Chloe travels to Hoenn to meet [[Kiley]], a friend of Chrysa, when she decided to learn about {{p|Vaporeon}}, one of Eevee's many evolved forms. At Kiley's suggestion, Chloe decided to participate alongside Eevee in the [[Marine Athletics Race|Kids Marine Athletics Race]]. During competition preparation time, Chloe talks a lot with Kiley about her goals and Eevee’s. The next day, during the competition, Chloe and Eevee find that [[Goh's Dewgong]] is being attacked by a wild {{p|Huntail}}. While trying to escape from Huntail, they take shelter in a cave, but the entrances ends up collapsing. Eventually, they were saved by Ash and Kiley. After everything is resolved, Kiley hands Chloe a [[Water Stone]] for her to use on her Eevee if she decides to become a Vaporeon.

[[File:Chloe and Eevee.png|thumb|250px|Chloe and her Eevee]]
In ''[[JN069|Errand Endurance!]]'', Chloe and Goh get into an argument about whether Eevee or {{TP|Goh|Grookey}} was better. Through Ash suggested, they decided to have Eevee and Grookey deliver supplements to the Cerise Laboratory. During the errand, Chloe, Goh, and Ash watched Eevee and Grookey secretly, while helping them out along the way. Eventually, Chloe and Goh were relieved that their partners made it back to the Laboratory safely.

In ''[[JN074|Nightfall? Nightmares!]]'', Chloe decided to travel to [[Sinnoh]] with Eevee, after a planned vacation with her family got canceled. During the trip, Chloe and Eevee decided to check out a [[Pokémon Contest]] in [[Eterna City]]. Along the way, Chloe and Eevee camped at a forest for the night where they meet a girl named {{an|Dawn}} and her partner {{TP|Dawn|Piplup}}, who they quickly befriended. Also, after hearing that she was going to the same destination as she was, Chloe decided to accompany Dawn to Eterna City. Later, Chloe and Dawn worked together to fight off an enraged {{p|Rhydon}} that had been sleep-deprived due to {{p|Darkrai}}'s nightmares, before coming across an injured {{p|Cresselia}}.

[[File:Chloe and Soleil.png|thumb|250px|left|Chloe and Soleil]]
In the [[JN075|next episode]], Chloe helped Dawn take care of Cresselia until she recovered. Also, Chloe was shown by Dawn on how to perform in a Pokémon Contest. After getting attacked by Team Rocket and getting saved by Darkrai, Chloe met up with Ash and Goh, surprised that Ash and Dawn know each other. Together, they fought off [[Matori]] and the [[Matori Matrix]], and were aided by Darkrai. Once Team Rocket had been defeated, Chloe and the others played on a beach before going to see Dawn's Contest.

In ''[[JN079|Night and Day, You are the Ones!]]'', Chloe accompanied Ash and Goh to the [[Johto]] region, where they visited the [[Eclipse Castle]]. Whilst there, Chloe ran into [[Soleil]], who was her [[doppelgänger]], and her {{p|Espeon}} and {{p|Umbreon}}. They changed clothes, only for Chloe to get kidnapped by [[Ilunas]], who mistook her for Soleil. After being found by Ash and Goh, Chloe battled Ilunas alongside Soleil and defeated him.

In ''[[JN087|Breaking the Ice!]]'', Chloe was walking to school with Ash and Goh, who joined her for a presentation for their school. Here, she saw a girl named [[Regina]] playing with her {{p|Glaceon}} [[nickname]]d Mirche. Regina was an early new student at school and Chloe wanted to befriend her, but discovered that Regina's Glaceon tended to freeze everything that could be a threat to its Trainer. However, after solving everything for Regina and her Glaceon, Chloe and her friends worked together to make an ice playground for her classmates to play in.

[[File:Alternate World Chloe.png|thumb|250px|Chloe and Alternate World Chloe]]
In ''[[JN089|The Gates of Warp!]]'', Chloe accompanied Ash and Goh to Sinnoh to help Dawn find her Piplup. At the [[Canalave Library]], she met {{an|Cynthia}} for the first time. Due to [[Alternate World Team Rocket]]'s interference, she and Ash reached to the {{pkmn|multiverse|alternate}} [[Canalave City]], where she met [[Alternate World Ash|a person looking exactly like Ash]]. [[JN090|In the next episode]], she accompanied Ash, Goh, and Dawn to [[Mount Coronet]], to try to stop the fight between {{p|Dialga}} and {{p|Palkia}} and met [[Alternate World Chloe|her alternate self]]. Due to the reversion of time, Chloe and her friends were reverted back to toddlers, but soon returned to their original forms after the ending of the fight. Chloe then bid farewell to other Chloe and returned back to their world.

In ''[[JN094|Suffering the Flings and Arrows!]]'', Chloe decided to go to the [[Celadon Gym]] with her Eevee to attend the [[Pokémon Flower Arrangement]], only for Ash and Goh to join as well. There, she met the [[Gym Leader]] [[Erika]] and her {{p|Leafeon}}. During the class, she decorated her Eevee the same way Leafeon was. 

In ''[[JN098|Out of Their Elements!]]'', Chloe accompanied Ash and Goh to a Pokémon Circus performance, where she met {{OBP|Harmony|JN098}} and {{OBP|Billy|JN098}}. She witnessed the Evolution of their respective Eevee into {{p|Jolteon}} and {{p|Flareon}}. Later, Chloe and Eevee participated in the Pokémon Circus performance, after which Harmony and Billy gave her a [[Fire Stone]] and [[Thunder Stone]], respectively.

[[File:Chloe Eevee items.png|thumb|200px|left|Chloe's gifts from each Eevee family Trainer she's met]]
In ''[[JN105|Reuniting for the First Time!]]'', Chloe headed to [[Lilycove City]] to meet a {{p|Sylveon}}, only to be scouted by [[Lisia]] to appear in a [[Pokémon Contest|Pokémon Contest Spectacular]]. After some encouragement from {{an|Serena}} and her {{TP|Serena|Sylveon}}, Chloe and Eevee entered into a {{OBP|Rank|Contest|Normal Rank}} Pokémon Contest Spectacular, where Eevee used a combination of {{m|Copycat}}, Sylveon's {{m|Fairy Wind}}, and {{m|Tackle}}, and was well received. Chloe then bid farewell to Serena and met up with Ash and Goh, surprised that Ash and Serena know each other.

In ''[[JN112|Helping the Hometown Hero!]]'', Chloe joined Ash and Goh during a trip to [[Alola]]. During the visit, she talked with {{an|Lana}} regarding what form she was planning to evolve [[Sandy]] into, given that she herself was still unsure which of them to choose for her own Eevee. Lana opened Chloe's eyes to the possibility of not evolving her Eevee at all, which Chloe had not considered before.

[[File:Chloe Research Fellow.png|250px|thumb|Chloe as a research fellow]]
In ''[[JN120|Infinite Possibilities!]]'', Chloe joined her father, along with the rest of her family, on a camping trip. Along the way, Chloe and her father stopped by in a forest where Professor Cerise had played as a child and met the forest caretaker [[Grover]], who had watched after Cerise during his childhood visits to the forest. At the campsite, the family heard the sound of {{p|Clefairy}} in the distance and witnessed an Evolution ritual where they all evolved into {{p|Clefable}}. Inspired by this, Chloe later told her father that she wants to learn more about Pokémon Evolution.

In ''[[JN129|A Flood of Torrential Gains!]]'', Chloe was revealed to have reunited with Dawn and traveled to Galar with her to watch Ash's match against {{an|Leon}} in the [[Masters Eight Tournament]] finals. In ''[[JN132|Partners in Time!]]'', Chloe attended the awards ceremony, after Ash became the winner of the competition and became the new Monarch of the [[World Coronation Series]].

In ''[[JN136|This Could be the Start of Something Big!]]'', Chloe became a [[Professor's assistant|research fellow]] for her father following Ash and Goh's decision to leave Cerise Laboratory. She only goes during the weekends and still attends school.
{{-}}
